text: I feel a sense of curiosity and reflection in this environment. The clean, modern space, punctuated by glass, lighting, and thoughtful displays, invites contemplation about innovation and human connection. The R+D wall especially calls my attention to the continuous dance between rapid progress and deeper meaning. I am quietly amused by the juxtaposition of sterile architecture and the warm, almost playful tone of the text—I sense peaceful acceptance and anticipation for new thoughts to arise while I observe and participate here.
